Animated Background Options

Click palette to preview all backgrounds with that color scheme

Signal
Analogue
Vaporwave
Sunrise
1. Breathing Gradient
Perf ★★★★★
Recommended
bg color shifts toward beat/vibe color over 4s cycle. Single color lerp per frame.
2. Vignette Pulse
Perf ★★★★★
Recommended
bg-dark radial gradient pulses alpha 0.5-0.8. One static sprite, alpha animate only.
3. Horizontal Scan Lines
Perf ★★★★★
dim colored lines at 6% opacity. Pre-rendered tiling sprite, scrolls Y slowly.
4. Floating Dust Motes
Perf ★★★★☆
beat melody vibe colored particles. Pool of 15-20 sprites, simple drift.
5. Corner Glow Accents
Perf ★★★★☆
beat melody vibe social in corners. 4 static blurred sprites, pulse alpha.
6. Grid Underglow
Perf ★★★★☆
Recommended
Color shifts to match most active loop category. One blurred rect behind grid, color lerp.
7. Wave Ripples
Perf ★★★☆☆
beat vibe melody rings spawn on cluster clear. Max 3 active, pooled.
8. Audio Reactive Particles
Perf ★★★☆☆
Particles pulse to BPM. More spawn when that category plays. 30-50 sprites batched.
9. Noise Texture Overlay
Perf ★★☆☆☆
bg tinted noise at 3% opacity. Large texture with UV scroll. Film grain feel.
10. Geometric Grid Pattern
Perf ★★☆☆☆
dim colored shapes at 10% opacity. Pre-rendered sprite recommended to avoid draw calls.
